Title: Frequently Asked Questions
Description: Find answers to the most common questions about Next.js to build reliable and scalable applications

content.text: We offer a comprehensive range of web development services including frontend development, backend development, full-stack solutions, and custom web applications tailored to your business needs.

FaqCard.Heading: How long does a typical project take?

content.text: Project timelines vary depending on complexity and requirements. Simple websites typically take 2-4 weeks, while complex web applications can take 2-6 months. We provide detailed timelines during the planning phase.

FaqCard.Heading: Do you provide ongoing support and maintenance?

content.text: Yes, we offer comprehensive support and maintenance packages to ensure your website or application continues to run smoothly. Our support includes regular updates, security patches, performance monitoring, and technical assistance.

FaqCard.Heading: What technologies do you work with?

content.text: We work with modern technologies including React, Next.js, Node.js, Python, PHP, MySQL, MongoDB, and various cloud platforms. We stay updated with the latest trends and best practices in web development.

FaqCard.Heading: Can you help with SEO optimization?

content.text: Absolutely! We integrate SEO best practices into our development process, including optimized code structure, meta tags, schema markup, fast loading times, and mobile responsiveness to improve your search engine rankings.

Our pricing is project-based and depends on the scope, complexity, and requirements. We provide detailed quotes after understanding your needs. Contact us for a personalized quote that fits your budget.
